mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate hike periods with p-value less than 0.05, or rolling Rank IC exceeds 0.05 positively.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate equity sell-offs within one week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 55% of instances where UNRATE rises above 0.3pp, or signal shows no statistical edge over random baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate earnings and driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to produce positive 60-day forward returns in greater than 60% of cases, or interaction term Rank IC is negative over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle indicates supply-side contraction that outweighs demand, forcing negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening periods yield positive 20-day forward returns in greater than 50% of cases, or regime-conditional alpha vanishes in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: CPI inflation exceeding 7.0% triggers aggressive central bank policy expectations, causing immediate negative market repricing within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of observations when CPIAUCSL exceeds 285.0, or threshold signal shows no predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total employment combined with falling unemployment rates confirms a robust labor market that sustains consumer spending and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Concurrent PAYEMS growth and UNRATE decline fails to generate positive 60-day forward returns in greater than 55% of cases, or interaction effect is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts indicate strong residential investment demand, which correlates with positive corporate revenue expectations and lifts S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: HOUST increases are followed by negative 20-day forward returns in greater than 50% of cases, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.02 over multi-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production dropping below 98.0 signals severe supply chain disruption that immediately depresses equity valuations within one week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of instances when INDPRO falls below 98.0, or signal loses predictive accuracy in walk-forward validation.
